title: Quest Mini Travel Iron/Steam Travel Iron with Temperature Control/Non-Stick Soleplate / 30ml Water Tank/Measuring Cup Included / 408W Power
features: TRAVEL STEAM IRON – This mini travel iron, measuring just 14.5 x 8 x 9.5cm, is perfect for travel with its ultra-compact size and lightweight build. It easily fits into bags and suitcases, making it ideal for holidays and business trips.

NON-STICK SOLEPLATE – Featuring a non-stick soleplate, the mini iron ensures a smooth ironing experience without any risk of damaging clothes. It is also able to deliver steam at a rate of 5g/min to ensure soft smooth clothing.

ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE – The iron’s temperature can easily be adjusted via the conveniently located dial on its body, and its 408W of power provides three different settings. Its 30ml water tank features a secure cap to prevent any leakage. A measuring cup is also included with the iron, to help you accurately fill the water tank. The iron’s design also features a cable clip to allow the cord to wrap around the iron’s neck in a space-saving manner.

PERFECT FOR QUILTING, SEWING & CRAFTS - The compact size and precision tip make this mini iron ideal for crafting, patchwork, appliqué, seams, and other delicate fabric projects. A must-have for hobbyists, quilters, and sewing enthusiasts.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Secure Water Tank The iron's 30ml water tank also features a secure removable cap to prevent any leakage. Compact Travel Size At a small size of just 14.5 x 8 x 9.5cm, the travel iron is perfect for holidays & business trips. Cord Storage The space-saving cord storage design allows it to be wrapped around the iron, with a cable clip. Adjustable Temperature Use the dial to change the temperature between one of three settings, ideal for different clothes. Steam Switch Activate the iron's steaming function via the switch conveniently located on top.
